zh.lifeSummary: 當Honora O'Conner於大約1174年出生在愛爾蘭時，她的父親Hugh O'Connor Kelly28歲，母親Mrs. Hugh O'Connor Kelly26歲。她於大約1194年與Lord Thomas FitzAnthony of Decies and Desmond結婚。他們至少是5個女兒的父母。她去世於1266年在她的家鄉享年93歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Honora O'Conner于大约1174年出生在爱尔兰时，她的父亲Hugh O'Connor Kelly28岁，母亲Mrs. Hugh O'Connor Kelly26岁。她于大约1194年与Lord Thomas FitzAnthony of Decies and Desmond结婚。他们至少是5个女儿的父母。她去世于1266年在她的家乡享年93岁。

nameMeanings.name: O'Conner
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Finbarr.

variants.name: O'Connor
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Siobhan, Donal, Aileen, Kieran, Aidan, Colm, Fitzgerald, Liam, Caitlin, Eamon, Niall.

Irish (especially Munster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Conchobhair ‘descendant of Conchobhar’, a personal name which is said to have originated as Cú Chobhair, from cú ‘hound’ (genitive con) + cobhar ‘desiring’, i.e. ‘hound of desire’. Present-day bearers of the surname claim descent from a 10th-century king of Connacht of this name. In Irish legend, Conchobhar was a king of Ulster who lived at around the time of Christ and who adopted the youthful Cú Chulainn.

nameMeanings.name: Honora
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: elaboration of   Honor  , used mainly in Ireland.

variants.name: Honorah
meanings: elaboration of   Honor  , used mainly in Ireland.

en.lifeSummary: When Honora O'Conner was born about 1174, in Ireland, her father, Hugh O'Connor Kelly, was 28 and her mother, Mrs. Hugh O'Connor Kelly, was 26. She married Lord Thomas FitzAnthony of Decies and Desmond about 1194. They were the parents of at least 5 daughters. She died in 1266, in her hometown, at the age of 93.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Honora O'Conner est née environ 1174, à Irlande, son père, Hugh O'Connor Kelly, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Hugh O'Connor Kelly, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Lord Thomas FitzAnthony of Decies and Desmond environ 1194. Ils ont eu au moins 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1266, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 93 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Honora O'Conner um 1174 in Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh O'Connor Kelly 28 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Hugh O'Connor Kelly 26. Sie hat um 1194 Lord Thomas FitzAnthony of Decies and Desmond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1266 im Alter von 93 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Honora O'Conner è nata il circa 1174 nel Irlanda, sua padre, Hugh O'Connor Kelly, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Hugh O'Connor Kelly, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Lord Thomas FitzAnthony of Decies and Desmond circa 1194. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figlie. Morì nel 1266, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 93 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Honora O'Connerが約1174年にアイルランドで生まれた時，父Hugh O'Connor Kellyは28歳，母Mrs. Hugh O'Connor Kellyは26歳であった。約1194年にLord Thomas FitzAnthony of Decies and Desmondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1266年に故郷で93歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Honora O'Conner(이)가 대략 1174년 아일랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh O'Connor Kelly(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Hugh O'Connor Kelly(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1194년 Lord Thomas FitzAnthony of Decies and Desmond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1266년 그녀의 고향에서 93세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Honora O'Conner nasceu aproximadamente 1174, em Irlanda, seu pai, Hugh O'Connor Kelly, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Hugh O'Connor Kelly, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord Thomas FitzAnthony of Decies and Desmond aproximadamente 1194. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1266, em sua cidade natal, com 93 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Honora O'Conner родилась около 1174 г. в местности Ирландия, её отцу по имени Hugh O'Connor Kelly было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Hugh O'Connor Kelly, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Thomas FitzAnthony of Decies and Desmond около 1194 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1266 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 93 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Honora O'Conner nació aproximadamente 1174, en Irlanda, su papá, Hugh O'Connor Kelly, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Mrs. Hugh O'Connor Kelly, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Lord Thomas FitzAnthony of Decies and Desmond aproximadamente 1194. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijas. Murió en 1266, en su pueblo, a la edad de 93 años.
